revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:伊加麻志神社]] {{Expand Japanese|伊加麻志神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Ikamashi Shrine | native_name = 伊加麻志神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ikamashi Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.006712|138.906308}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Ikamashi Shrine'''|伊加麻志神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11380552|ltq=Q11380552|qid=Q11380552|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province}} ** Series ordinal: 52 ** P155: {{ill|Q135039670|ltq=Q135039670|qid=Q135039670|1=Ihatokono Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Hiroseno Shrine|lt=Hiroseno Shrine|qid=Q135039671|1=Hiroseno Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q860928|ltq=Q860928|qid=Q860928|1=Izu Province}} * {{ill|Q1154841|ltq=Q1154841|qid=Q1154841|1=Tagata District, Shizuoka}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.006712|138.906308}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181620 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Son-sha|lt=Son-sha|ja|村社|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県伊豆市堀切字益山', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:伊加麻志神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134926830}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Ikamashi Shrine |Image = {{Image wanted|cat=Izu City}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|0|24.2|N|138|54|22.7|E}}}} |Location = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Izu City|Q696840|qid=Q696840|1=Izu, Shizuoka}} Horigiri 763 |Coordinates = {{coord|35|0|24.2|N|138|54|22.7|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deity = {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|qid=Q8009611}} |Shrine rank = Former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage affiliation = |Annual festival = October 15 |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Ikamashi
Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|35|0|24.2|N|138|54|22.7|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Ikamashi Shrine''' (いかましじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Horigiri, {{ill|lt=Izu City|Q696840|qid=Q696840|1=Izu, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402194 Ikamashi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines === Overview === It is enshrined within the precincts of Masuyamadera Temple, located atop Mt. Masuyama, between {{ill|lt=Mount Katsuragi (Izunokuni City)|Q11620896|qid=Q11620896|lt=Mount Katsuragi|1=Mount Katsuragi}} and {{ill|lt=Mount Shiro (Izunokuni City)|Q11426081|qid=Q11426081|lt=Mount Shiro|1=Mount Jō}} and {{ill|lt=Hattanjo-yama|Q11579067|qid=Q11579067|1=Mount Hottanjō}} (the so-called Izu Three Mountains), at the northern edge of the Horigiri district in northwestern Izu City.[https://kanko.city.izu.shizuoka.jp/form1.html?c1=7&c2=8&pid=3185 Masuyamadera Temple] - Izu City Although the date of foundation is unknown, it is identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} of the same name, Ikamashi Shrine, and is an ancient shrine recorded in the {{ill|lt=Izu Province Shinkaichō|Q17193087|qid=Q17193087|1=Izu Province Shinkaichō}} as “Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Takayama no Myōjin.”[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ikamasi_title.htm Ikamashi Shrine] - Genmatsuko[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140209-01.html Ikamashi Shrine] - Research on Engishiki Shrines From the Edo period until the early Meiji period, it was called Mishima Myōjin (Mishima Shrine). In the 12th year of {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} ({{ill|lt=1879|Q7783|qid=Q7783|1=1879}}), it was ranked as a village shrine. In the 19th year of Meiji ({{ill|lt=1886|Q7822|qid=Q7822|1=1886}}), it was renamed Ikamashi Shrine, and in the 14th year of {{ill|lt=Taishō|Q329174|qid=Q329174|1=Taishō era}} ({{ill|lt=1925|Q18107|qid=Q18107|1=1925}}), it was designated a shrine authorized to receive offerings of sacred cloth and coinage from the government. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|qid=Q8009611}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402194 Ikamashi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ikamashi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ikamashi Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Izu, Shizuoka]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]]
